mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months following a rate decline.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden increase in the unemployment rate above 0.5 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or out-of-sample hit rate falls below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand and economic momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns with a statistically significant coefficient (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production signals immediate supply-side bottlenecks and reduced corporate output, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days during inflationary periods.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines do not predict negative 5d returns when CPIAUCSL exceeds the threshold, with out-of-sample accuracy below 52% over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above 3.0 percent year-over-year forces expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward 20d returns remain positive in >65% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the threshold, or rolling Rank IC stays below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC for PAYEMS growth against 60d forward returns falls below 0.01, or positive payroll growth correlates with negative equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing real GDP growth and rising unemployment indicates stagflationary pressure, eroding corporate profit margins and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 7.5 and GDPC1 growth crosses below 1.5%
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict negative 20d returns with a hit rate above 55% in out-of-sample testing, or interaction term loses significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production levels signal strengthening manufacturing output and improved supply chain efficiency, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive month-over-month changes in INDPRO are followed by negative 5d SPX returns in >60% of observations over a 5-year rolling window.
